column1: damage_valid_attacker is the sum of final post-mitigation hit damage of valid damage types (e.g. lightning damage if shock per default, and cold if chill per default)
ailmentMultiplier is increased shock/chill effect of the ailment source (player or enemy)
extraEffectMultiplier is 1.0 if the ailment source is the player, and 1.4 if it's an enemy
specialChillMultiplier is 0.7 if the ailment-to-be-inflicted is a chill, otherwise 1.0
